experiment: X9 v2 — External Autocatalytic Network Replication
description: External-data replication of X9 on the published CatReNet example-9 origin-of-metabolism autocatalytic network (Xavier et al. 2020). Molecule-level layers: d1=reactant_coupling, d2=catalyst_product, d3=product_dependency.

hypotheses.statement: In the published external autocatalytic network, catalyst-to-product structure is closer to product-dependency structure than simple reactant co-presence is: r(catalyst_product, product_dependency) > r(reactant_coupling, product_dependency).
Core autocatalytic molecule a remains top-tier in product_dependency, ranking within the top 2 hubs.
Core autocatalytic molecule a is also top-tier in catalyst_product, ranking within the top 3 hubs.
At least 3 molecules show strong role divergence (rank gap >= 3) between reactant_coupling and product_dependency, indicating specialization beyond simple co-reactant pairing.

notes: External-source replication using a published autocatalytic CRS from CatReNet example-9 / Xavier et al. 2020. Dataset is built after preregistration from the local CRS snapshot.
